revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:橋姫神社]]
{{Referencesの明記| date = 2024th year 10月}} {{Infobox religious building |名称 = 橋姫神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image=File:Hashihime Shrine.JPG | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = 京都府宇治市宇治蓮華47番地 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|53|28|N|135|48|21|E|}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|deity = {{ill|Hashihime|qid=Q3783599|1=Hashihime}} |創建 = |本殿 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = [[6月10日]] ||location = {{ill|Uji|qid=Q326956|1=Uji}} |coordinates = {{Coord|34.891111|N|135.805833|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }}
'''Hashihime Shrine''' (橋姫神社) is a Shinto shrine located in Uji, Kyoto Prefecture. It is believed to protect the Uji Bridge.
== Enshrined deity ==
The shrine is dedicated to '''Seoritsuhime''' (瀬織津媛) or '''Hashihime''' (橋姫).
== History ==
The shrine is said to have been established in '''646 CE''' (2nd year of the Taika era) when the Uji Bridge was first constructed. Originally, Seoritsuhime was enshrined upstream in an area called '''Sakuradani'''. Initially, the shrine was located within the grounds of '''Hōjō-in Jōkō-ji''' (commonly known as "Hashi-dera" or "Bridge Temple"), built into a section of the bridge called the "third span." Later, it was relocated to the western end of the Uji Bridge. After being washed away in a flood in '''1870''' (3rd year of the Meiji era), it was moved to its current location in '''1906''' (39th year of the Meiji era).
== Shrine Grounds ==
* '''Main Shrine''': Dedicated to Hashihime or Seoritsuhime * '''Sub-Shrine (Sessha)''': '''Sumiyoshi Shrine''', enshrining Sumiyoshi Myojin
== Annual Festival ==
* '''Reisai (Annual Festival):''' Held on '''June 10''' each year.
== Access ==
* A '''10-minute walk''' from '''Keihan Electric Railway's Uji Station'''.
== Related Sites ==
* '''{{ill|Hashihime|en|Hashihime|qid=Q3783599|lt=Hashihime|1=Hashihime}}''' * '''{{ill|Aedo Hashihime Shrine|ja|饗土橋姫神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aedo Hashihime Shrine|qq=}}''' - A shrine in [[Ise]] City, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}, protecting the {{ill|Uji Bridge (Ise City)|ja|宇治橋_(伊勢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uji Bridge (Ise City)|qq=}} there. * '''[[Seoritsu-hime|Seoritsuhime]]'''
== External Links ==
{{Commonscat|Hashihime-jinja}}
== Categories ==
